examples: The star halfback hauled down the pass for a touchdown.
The quarterback faked to the fullback and handed off to the halfback.
She has the purple hat and scarf, knitting tie-in black leather halfback.
Scott grew up in Arkansas, the daughter of a former Miss Arkansas and an all-American halfback.
Amy Day and Awen Thomas form a new halfback partnership while Clare Flowers and Elen Evans return to the midfield.
